core_payload.content:
# Tile Layout Algorithm Concept

## 1. Objective
Design an algorithmic strategy for tile patterns that balances aesthetics, installation complexity, and material efficiency.

## 2. Strategies
Use deterministic pattern generators, constraint aware boundary handling, and waste estimation with configurable margins.

## 3. Evaluation
Every layout should emit metrics such as cut count, edge complexity, estimated waste, and labor intensity.

## 4. Research
Explore hybrid methods that combine deterministic templates with local optimization on irregular geometry.

neuro_concentrate.summary: Tile Layout Algorithm in the Dream branch is archived with the rest of the TileSims line so its future optimization core remains preserved without remaining live. It still imagines stronger pattern selection, richer boundary handling, better waste and labor reasoning, and more transparent tradeoff scoring across competing layout strategies. The concept matters because layout quality determines whether the spatial graph becomes economically useful or only visually interesting. In archive mode Dream keeps this explainable layout-intelligence engine as recoverable future leverage.
